allow: PowerShell(git -C $repo tag -a v1.5.2 43a083b -m "v1.5.2: rollback-message + first-install fixes, vendored nssm.exe" 2>&1)

PowerShell(git remote -v; $runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Xavier8264/bay-tracker/actions/workflows/python-package.yml/runs?per_page=5"; $runs.workflow_runs | Select-Object id, run_number, conclusion, head_branch, created_at | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Xavier8264/bay-tracker/actions/runs/28794179220/jobs"; $jobId = \($jobs.jobs | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'build \(3.11\)' }\).id; try { $log = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Xavier8264/bay-tracker/actions/jobs/$jobId/logs" -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing; $log.Content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $log.Content.Length - 6000\)\) } catch { "LOG FETCH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Content venv\\pyvenv.cfg; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe tests\\test_time_engine.py > $null; "time_engine EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe tests\\test_undo.py > $null; "undo EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe tests\\test_notify.py > $null; "notify EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(& .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe tests\\test_time_engine.py > $null; "time_engine EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe tests\\test_undo.py > $null; "undo EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe tests\\test_notify.py > $null; "notify EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests -q)

PowerShell(& .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests\\test_zz_conftest_probe.py -q; "probe pytest EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; Remove-Item tests\\test_zz_conftest_probe.py -Confirm:$false; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install flake8 --quiet --disable-pip-version-check; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics --exclude=venv,wheelhouse; "flake8 EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE")
